title: cleanup: remove 10 unused secrets across enter/image/text
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the vault
gist.blurb: We just did a massive sweep of our internal configuration, removing old, unused API keys and secrets. A cleaner codebase means a happier, more secure hive!
gist.summary: Removed 10 unused secrets and associated dead code across the enter, image, and text services to streamline configuration.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup reduces configuration clutter and improves security hygiene without affecting any user-facing features.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny janitor's hat, sweeping away old glowing keys or locks into a dustpan. Nomnom creature eating old keys.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny janitor's hat, sweeping up old glowing pixelated keys with a small broom. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a discarded key. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny janitor's hat, sweeping up old glowing pixelated keys with a small broom. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a discarded key. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
